caption: A person's hands are shown opening a box of sports trading cards on a red and black surface featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the URL "CASEBREAKS.com". The person removes a glossy basketball card from a black "OBSIDIAN" box that notes "2 AUTOGRAPHS!". The card features a player in a light blue jersey and is held up for the camera. In the background, smaller inset video feeds show a man with a beard wearing a black shirt sitting at a desk with a computer and equipment. As the sequence progresses, the hands pull the card further out of the box and hold it steady, revealing the player's name, "KENYON MARTIN JR.", printed at the bottom of the card. The background elements and the "JASPYS" branding remain consistent across the scene.
